package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for preload_rules_scattered_across_layers: Preload decisions spread across handlers, services, and repositories instead of one query owner.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule115NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule115NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule115NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario115Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule115NegativeService, input Rule115NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
